Identity._comment: AB#4208 — Start-Octo runs MCP natively on localhost:5017 which does not fit the mcp.${octo.domain} composition. The override resolves ${octo.mcp.publicUrl} for the System.Identity.Bootstrap blueprint apply. Cluster deployments run with ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT!=Development and rely on OCTO_BLUEPRINTS__DOMAIN + the composition path instead.
